description: Add notification center with persistent read state, badges, list, filtering, and clearing

userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read/unread state persisted so read status survives sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add storage for read state per user and notification
Migration or schema changes applied safely

userStories.title: Show unread badge and notification list UI
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge and ability to open notification list so I can see alerts.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Mark notifications read/unread
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread so I manage attention.
acceptanceCriteria: API to mark read/unread updates persistent state
UI actions reflect state without data loss

userStories.title: Filter notifications by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read/unread so I can focus on unread items.
acceptanceCriteria: Filter applied client-side or via query
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so I can tidy my list.
acceptanceCriteria: Button to clear read notifications removes them from list and storage
Action recorded in audit or logs if required
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
